content: We can refactor the ACP harness agent runtime execution model to use ICM curiosity mechanisms as a dynamic runtime scheduling core, where intrinsic reward from exploratory agent actions replaces static pre-defined pipeline failure strategies and job parallelization rules. This creates a self-optimizing long-running agent runtime that automatically prioritizes high-uncertainty, high-learning tasks without manual pipeline configuration.
source_topics: ACP harness agent runtime execution model
trigger_topic: ACP harness agent runtime execution model
